category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for China-to-Vietnam export.

target_market_label.zh: 越南（信息通信部 / VNPT / VIETCERT）
target_market_label.zht: 越南（信息通信部 / VNPT / VIETCERT）

title.en: China-to-Vietnam Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MIC Type Approval)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入越南：信息通信部型号认证合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入越南：信息通信部型號認證合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth and IoT wireless device documentation against Vietnam MIC mandatory type approval (Giay phep vien thong) under the Law on Telecommunications, ICTQC conformity declaration under QCVN mandatory technical regulations (QCVN 47, QCVN 18, QCVN 3, QCVN 15), TCVN electrical safety standards, authorized importer and Vietnamese labelling requirements, and MIC import permit obligations — contrasted with China SRRC radio type approval, MIIT network access licence, CCC certification, and GB technical standards.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网无线设备文件与越南信息通信部（MIC）强制型号认证（Giay phep vien thong，依据《电信法》）、ICTQC依据QCVN强制技术规范（QCVN 47、QCVN 18、QCVN 3、QCVN 15）的合格声明、TCVN电气安全标准、授权进口商及越南语标注要求，以及MIC进口许可义务的差距对照——与中国SRRC无线电型号核准、工信部网络接入许可、CCC认证及GB技术标准进行对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網無線裝置文件與越南信息通信部（MIC）強制型號認證（Giay phep vien thong，依據《電信法》）、ICTQC依據QCVN強制技術規範（QCVN 47、QCVN 18、QCVN 3、QCVN 15）的合格聲明、TCVN電氣安全標準、授權進口商及越南語標注要求，以及MIC進口許可義務的差距對照——與中國SRRC無線電型號核准、工信部網路存取許可、CCC認證及GB技術標準進行對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, MIC type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current MIC regulations, applicable QCVN technical standards, labelling requirements, and Vietnam market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Vietnam.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、MIC型号认证批准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于越南销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行MIC法规、适用QCVN技术标准、标注要求及越南市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、MIC型號認證批准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於越南銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行MIC法規、適用QCVN技術標準、標注要求及越南市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: MIC mandatory type approval (Giay phep vien thong) under Vietnam's Law on Telecommunications, ICTQC conformity declaration against QCVN 47 / QCVN 18 / QCVN 3, TCVN electrical safety, authorized importer appointment, and an MIC import permit before customs clearance are the major Vietnam compliance gaps for Chinese wireless device exporters. China's SRRC approval, CCC certification, MIIT network access licence, and GB standards provide no equivalence — full Vietnam-specific certification is required.
answer_first.zh: 越南《电信法》下的MIC强制型号认证（Giay phep vien thong）、针对QCVN 47/QCVN 18/QCVN 3的ICTQC合格声明、TCVN电气安全、授权进口商指定，以及海关通关前的MIC进口许可，是中国无线设备出口商进入越南市场的主要合规差距。中国SRRC认证、CCC认证、工信部网络接入许可及GB标准均不具同等效力——须完成越南特定的全套认证程序。
answer_first.zht: 越南《電信法》下的MIC強制型號認證（Giay phep vien thong）、針對QCVN 47/QCVN 18/QCVN 3的ICTQC合格聲明、TCVN電氣安全、授權進口商指定，以及海關通關前的MIC進口許可，是中國無線設備出口商進入越南市場的主要合規差距。中國SRRC認證、CCC認證、工信部網路存取許可及GB標準均不具同等效力——須完成越南特定的全套認證程序。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon QCVN / MIC regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verified flag before human_reviewed can be set to true. QCVN version changes require row-level update.

q.en: What type approval is required to import wireless devices into Vietnam?
q.zh: 进口无线设备至越南需要哪种型号认证？
q.zht: 進口無線設備至越南需要哪種型號認證？

a.en: Vietnam's Ministry of Information and Communications (MIC) requires mandatory type approval — Giay phep vien thong — for radio frequency and telecom terminal equipment under the Law on Telecommunications (2009, amended 2023) and supporting decrees. The MIC type approval certificate must be obtained before customs clearance. Products must be tested at a VILAS-accredited laboratory against applicable QCVN mandatory technical regulations (e.g., QCVN 47 for RF devices, QCVN 18 for short-range devices, QCVN 3 for telecom terminal equipment). An authorized importer or representative in Vietnam is required, and labelling must include the MIC approval number in Vietnamese.
a.zh: 越南信息通信部（MIC）依据《电信法》（2009年，2023年修订）及配套法规，对射频及电信终端设备实施强制型号认证（Giay phep vien thong）。MIC型号认证证书须在海关通关前取得。产品须在VILAS认可实验室按适用QCVN强制技术规范进行测试（例如：射频设备适用QCVN 47、短距离设备适用QCVN 18、电信终端设备适用QCVN 3）。须在越南设立授权进口商或代表，标签须以越南语标注MIC认证编号。
a.zht: 越南信息通信部（MIC）依據《電信法》（2009年，2023年修訂）及配套法規，對射頻及電信終端設備實施強制型號認證（Giay phep vien thong）。MIC型號認證證書須在海關通關前取得。產品須在VILAS認可實驗室按適用QCVN強制技術規範進行測試（例如：射頻設備適用QCVN 47、短距離設備適用QCVN 18、電信終端設備適用QCVN 3）。須在越南設立授權進口商或代表，標籤須以越南語標注MIC認證編號。

q.en: Does China's SRRC approval or CCC certification satisfy Vietnam MIC requirements?
q.zh: 中国SRRC认证或CCC认证是否满足越南MIC要求？
q.zht: 中國SRRC認證或CCC認證是否滿足越南MIC要求？

a.en: No. Vietnam operates an independent MIC type approval system and does not recognise CE, FCC, SRRC, or CCC approvals. There is no mutual recognition agreement between Vietnam and China for wireless device type approval. Chinese exporters must obtain full Vietnam MIC type approval, ICTQC conformity certification, and an MIC import permit separately — Chinese SRRC and CCC documentation may support the technical dossier but cannot substitute for the Vietnam approvals.
a.zh: 不。越南实行独立的MIC型号认证制度，不承认CE、FCC、SRRC或CCC认证。越南与中国之间不存在无线设备型号认证互认协议。中国出口商须单独取得越南MIC型号认证、ICTQC合格证明及MIC进口许可——中国SRRC及CCC文件可支持技术文档编制，但不能替代越南认证。
a.zht: 不。越南實行獨立的MIC型號認證制度，不承認CE、FCC、SRRC或CCC認證。越南與中國之間不存在無線設備型號認證互認協議。中國出口商須單獨取得越南MIC型號認證、ICTQC合格證明及MIC進口許可——中國SRRC及CCC文件可支持技術文件編制，但不能替代越南認證。
